display.purpose: Latin hero / section heroes — heavy, tight Inter 800.

cn-display.purpose: Chinese hero headings — Noto Serif SC, serif, never sans.

title.purpose: Card titles, panel and dialog headers — Inter 600.

body.purpose: Prose and UI copy — Inter 450, capped 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Form labels, button text, list names — Inter 600, Sentence case.

mono.purpose: Metadata, counts, run ids, kickers — Space Mono, UPPERCASE, 0.14em.

shadows.name: edge
shadows.purpose: Lowest tier — 1px light hairline for flat cards, inputs, secondary buttons.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: The signature 招牌柔影 — primary floating cards and hover states.

shadows.name: accent-glow
shadows.purpose: Cobalt glow under primary buttons — the only colored shadow.

shadows.name: frosted-pop
shadows.purpose: 毛玻璃 frosted-glass controls floating over color or imagery.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing — lifts, reveals, state transitions.

motion.name: dur-enter
motion.purpose: FadeUpBlur entrance — plays once, reduced-motion shows end state.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The primary action. Cobalt pill with an accent glow that lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary{font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:15px;border:0;cursor:pointer;border-radius:999px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:13px 24px;background:#0B5CFF;color:#fff;box-shadow:0 10px 24px -8px rgba(11,92,255,.5);transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),box-shadow .25s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),background .2s} .ds-btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);background:#1466FF;box-shadow:0 16px 32px -8px rgba(11,92,255,.5)} .ds-btn-primary:active{transform:translateY(0) scale(.98)} .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible{outline:3px solid rgba(11,92,255,.45);outline-offset:2px}

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Neutral action. Sunken fill with a 1px light edge; lifts slightly on hover.

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Pill field, sunken at rest, brightens to white with a cobalt ring on focus.

components.name: Floating Card
components.description: The signature white surface floating on the gray ground via the six-layer soft shadow.
components.html:
Research Agent

crawls + drafts briefs · 给 Agent 发消息
components.css: .ds-card{background:#fff;border-radius:22px;padding:30px 32px;max-width:320px;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;color:#17171B;box-shadow:0 60px 80px rgba(15,15,15,.07),0 25px 33px rgba(15,15,15,.05),0 13.4px 17.9px rgba(15,15,15,.045),0 7.5px 10px rgba(15,15,15,.04),0 4px 5.3px rgba(15,15,15,.03),0 1.7px 2.2px rgba(15,15,15,.022)} .ds-card h3{margin:0 0 6px;font-size:18px;font-weight:600} .ds-card p{margin:0;font-size:14px;line-height:1.55;color:#56565E}

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill status chip — soft wash background with deepened text and an optional leading dot.

components.name: App Icon (glass)
components.description: Signature product icon — a geometric brand glyph in a same-color frosted squircle.

narrative.northStar: 柔软的构成主义 · Soft Constructivism
narrative.overview: Take the rigor of De Stijl — the three primaries straight off the Ezagent cube logo, pure color as structure, no gradients — and soften the form until it floats. That tension is the whole system: disciplined color, gentle surface. Color blocks are flat and confident; the surfaces that carry them are white cards lifted off a calm light-gray ground by huge layered soft shadows. The grid is rigid; the edges are made of light. The system serves the Organization IDE (组织 IDE) — a workspace to build, run, and ship an organization's AI agents — so it disappears into the task: dense panels, consistent controls, a single action color, earned familiarity. It is bilingual at the core (中文 · English) and speaks in three voices of type: heavy tight Inter for Latin display, Noto Serif SC for Chinese headings, Space Mono for data.
keyCharacteristics: De Stijl primaries (红 / 墨蓝 / 黄 + 翠) as the brand axis; one bright cobalt as the only interactive color.
Flat solid color over generous whitespace — never gradients, never grain.
White cards floating on a light-gray ground via a six-layer signature soft shadow.
Pills everywhere: buttons, inputs, badges, segmented controls.
Bilingual zh/en voice with the interpunct · as house grammar.
Full dark theme; WCAG AA contrast; reduced-motion respected.

rules.name: The One-Voice Rule
rules.body: Cobalt #0B5CFF is the only interactive color. If something is clickable, selectable, or focused, it is cobalt; if it is cobalt, it is interactive. Structural ink-blue is identity, never an affordance.

rules.name: The No-Gradient Rule
rules.body: 纯色与留白，而非渐变与噪声 — pure color and whitespace, never gradients and noise. Every fill is a single flat color; no background-clip:text gradient headings.

rules.name: The Wash Rule
rules.body: Each strong color has a soft tint wash paired with a deepened text tone. Status surfaces are wash + deep-text, never full-saturation behind small text.

rules.name: The CN-Serif Rule
rules.body: Chinese headings are Noto Serif SC, not a sans. The serif carries the brand's warmth; Latin display stays heavy Inter.

rules.name: The Mono-Metadata Rule
rules.body: Numbers, units, code, run ids, overlines and kickers are Space Mono, lowercase units, terse. Never set body or labels in mono.

rules.name: The Light-Edge Rule
rules.body: Structure is carried by elevation and tint, not by 1px gray borders. Reach for edge/shadow before a border. Side-stripe borders are forbidden.

rules.name: The Lift-on-Hover Rule
rules.body: Interactive surfaces lift: buttons translateY(-2px) and deepen their shadow, cards translateY(-3px) into the floating shadow, press settles to scale(.98). Calm at rest, buoyant on touch.

dos: Do float white cards on the #E8E8EB ground with the six-layer floating shadow; let elevation, not borders, carry structure.
Do spend cobalt #0B5CFF only on actions, focus, current selection, and state — the One-Voice Rule.
Do pair copy as 中文 · English with the interpunct ·; CN headings in Noto Serif SC, data in Space Mono.
Do use pills (999px) for buttons, inputs, badges, and segmented controls; lift on hover, settle to scale(.98) on press.
Do ship every interactive component with default / hover / focus-visible / active / disabled (and invalid for inputs).
Do hit WCAG AA (body ≥4.5:1, large ≥3:1, placeholders ≥4.5:1) and give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion end-state.
donts: Don't use gradients or noise anywhere — 纯色与留白，而非渐变与噪声. No background-clip:text gradient headings.
Don't use emoji as personality or iconography; geometric brand glyphs and the cube logo carry it.
Don't build identical icon-and-heading card grids repeated endlessly, and never nest cards.
Don't use borders as the primary edge, and never a border-left/right > 1px colored side-stripe — use shadow and tint.
Don't wrap the app in full-bleed chrome; fixed sidebars and top bars are their own floating cards.
Don't put a white glyph on a light fill (yellow squircle → dark glyph), and don't reach for the cream/sand body, the hero-metric template, or tracked uppercase eyebrows on every section.
